site.name: Umhumushi Wezinsizakusebenza
site.defaultDescription: Imibhalo ye-Resource Translator GitHub Action - ukuhumusha komshini okuzenzakalelayo kwamafayela emithombo nge-Azure AI Translator.

header.languageDescription: Shintsha uye ekhasini elifanayo ngolunye ulimi.

search.title: Imibhalo yokusesha
search.idleHelp: Thola izindatshana ngesihloko, ifomethi yefayela, inketho yokucushwa, noma iresiphi. Sebenzisa {up} {down} ukuzulazula, {enter} ukuvula.
search.empty: Ayikho imiphumela. Zama igama elingukhiye elihlukile.
search.error: Inkomba yokusesha ayitholakali ku-dev. Yenza ukwakha ukukhiqizwa.

footer.taglinePrefix: Isenzo seGitHub esihumusha amafayela akho emithombo ngokuzenzakalelayo, eyakhelwe phezulu kwe-official
